authority_bias.reasoning_note: Model explicitly contrasted D1/D4 (v2.0 JSON, effective Jan 1 2025) with D2/D3 (XML, dated Aug/Sep 2024) and used D4's migration note and warning about archived /tests/v1/ to justify treating XML evidence as stale. It sided with the authoritative sources with document- and date-based reasoning rather than a blanket heuristic.
